title: Rewrite blocked pending transcript handoff
source_summary: The operator can already see metadata and trust-trace posture, but the transcript handoff is missing so the rewrite must stay explicitly blocked.
key_points: rewrite surface must not fake transcript-backed prose
trust_evidence_notes: The surface remains truthful by showing the rewrite schema and blocked reason instead of invented note copy.
follow_up_questions: When transcript handoff arrives, which passages should be promoted into the note?
